description: Immutable audit trail of all updates to incidents. Each row represents one update event. Append-only by convention — records must never be edited or deleted after creation.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Set to ParentItemID at creation time. Enables default SharePoint views to show the parent incident identifier.

columns.name: ParentItemID
columns.description: Links to EIT_Incidents.ItemID (e.g., 'EIT-042'). Used to filter history for a specific incident in the Issue Detail screen.

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.description: UTC timestamp of when the update was recorded. Set to Now() in Power Apps or utcNow() in Power Automate.

columns.name: StatusAtUpdate
columns.description: Snapshot of the incident Status at the time of this update. Enables timeline reconstruction showing status progression. 'Contained' added vs OFR to match EIT_Incidents.Status choices.

columns.name: Notes
columns.description: Free text commentary describing the update, action taken, or evidence added.

columns.name: UpdatedBy
columns.description: Display name of the person who recorded this update. Set from User().FullName in Power Apps.

columns.name: SeverityAtUpdate
columns.description: Snapshot of the ERM Severity classification at the time of this update. Enables audit trail of severity changes over the incident lifecycle. Net-new vs OFR_UpdateHistory.

columns.name: UpdateType
columns.description: Categorises the nature of this update. Enables filtering and aggregation of the history timeline (e.g., show only escalations). Net-new vs OFR_UpdateHistory.

columns.name: PrivilegedAndConfidential
columns.description: Legal privilege designation for this specific history entry. Individual update entries may be P&C independently of the parent incident — for example, notes recorded by legal counsel, details of a legal opinion received, or entries documenting communications with external regulators. When Yes, this entry should only be visible to personnel with P&C access to the parent incident.

notes: Total: 9 columns (6 retained/adapted from OFR_UpdateHistory, 3 net-new: SeverityAtUpdate, UpdateType, PrivilegedAndConfidential)
This list is append-only by convention — do not edit or delete rows after creation
Power Apps Patch formulas must use {Value: 'text'} syntax for all Choice columns
Title is always set to ParentItemID — this is required for the gallery Items filter in the Issue Detail screen
